resposta:
solution:
```
class Solution:
    def defangIPaddr(self, address: str) -> str:
        return address.replace('.', '[.]')
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: This solution uses Python's built-in string replace method, which efficiently replaces all occurrences of '.' with '[.]' in the input string.
